blocks.text: After Glimt's San Siro miracle — CL drama continues
Bodø/Glimt knocked out Inter — one of Norwegian football's greatest nights. PSG face Monaco in a live French derby at 21:00, while Real Madrid must hold their narrow lead at the Bernabéu.
⚽ 18:45 — Atalanta vs Dortmund (CL, 2-0 agg — Dortmund heavy favourites to advance)
⚽ 21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray (CL, Galatasaray through barring a 4-goal Juve miracle)

blocks.label: Must-Watch Weekend
items: ⚽ Sat 16:00 — West Ham at Liverpool (title race, Anfield)
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Villarreal at Barcelona (La Liga title fight, Camp Nou)
🎮 Fri 16:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) in ESL Pro League S23
